posts.text:
It’s time to ban mifepristone for abortion. 

And it’s time to empower these women to hold these foreign manufacturers accountable

Video

My latest in @realDailyWire on why Congress must ban the chemical abortion drug: 

dailywire.com/news/the-abort…

Sure looks to me like the giant fertilizer companies are price gouging farmers. Which drives farmers out of business and the price of food way up. Somebody needs to explain to them price gouging is illegal. So either stop or be investigated 👉

What is a woman, Gavin?


Gavin Newsom (@GavinNewsom)

The “freedom” party strikes again.



— https://nitter.net/GavinNewsom/status/2032120148346478699#m

Always great to have @MOFarmBureau in Washington. 

Farmers are the lifeblood of our state and our nation. Thank you for feeding the world
